summary: Kimi Antonelli arrives at Silverstone with commanding momentum after claiming pole position and sprint victory, but 180,000 home fans will test whether the Mercedes rookie can deliver a maiden Grand Prix win or fade under pressure. Lewis Hamilton hunts redemption against his former team after finishing behind both Antonelli and Leclerc, while Ferrari's pace suggests a three-way dogfight for victory will determine who gains crucial points in the championship battle. A dominant performance from Antonelli would reshape the title narrative and announce the teenager as a genuine championship contender, while a collapse could hand the initiative back to established rivals.
